data.title: Over $5B Pouring into Bitcoin ETFs – Thanks to Bold Directional Bets
data.description:
• Billions have flowed into U.S.-listed spot bitcoin ETFs, driven by strategic bullish bets rather than arbitrage plays.
  • The 11 spot ETFs have attracted over $5.61 billion since April, pushing total inflows since January 2024 to over $41 billion.
  • CFTC data indicates leveraged funds have reduced net shorts, suggesting a shift towards directional bets from arbitrage plays.

data.title: Movement Labs and Mantra Scandal Are Shaking up Crypto Market-Making
data.description:
• Crypto market-making faces scrutiny after scandals involving Movement Labs' MOVE and Mantra's OM tokens.
  • Market makers are reevaluating token risk underwriting and demanding greater transparency.
  • The secondary OTC market is distorting token supply dynamics and complicating price discovery.

data.title: ETH, DOGE, XRP Down 3% as Moody’s Downgrades the U.S. Credit Score
data.description:
• Major cryptocurrencies, including ether, XRP, and dogecoin, fell about 3% after Moody's downgraded the U.S. credit rating.
  • Moody's cut the U.S. sovereign credit rating to Aa1 from Aaa, citing rising deficits and interest expenses.
  • The U.S. Treasury yields rose and S&P 500 futures dipped following the downgrade, impacting both traditional and crypto markets.

data.title: Undervalued Ether Catching Eye of ETF Buyers as Rally Inbound: CryptoQuant
data.description:
• Ethereum's current low trading level against Bitcoin mirrors 2019, when ETH subsequently surged and outperformed BTC.
  • Institutional investors are increasing their ETH holdings, anticipating it will outperform BTC, possibly due to the recent Pectra upgrade.
  • On-chain data indicates reduced selling pressure and increased trading volume for ETH, suggesting potential for significant gains.

data.title: Alchemy Acquires Solana Developer DexterLab for Undisclosed Sum
data.description:
• Blockchain development platform Alchemy said it has acquired Solana developer DexterLab for an undisclosed sum.
  • Alchemy said the acquisition will help consolidate Solana development alongside that of Ethereum to reduce complexity for projects building across multiple networks.

data.title: Crypto Miners Soar on OpenAI-CoreWeave Deal; Galaxy Jumps in Nasdaq Debut
data.description:
• CoreWeave’s $4 billion deal with OpenAI lifted crypto-adjacent data center stocks by as much as 20%.
  • Galaxy Digital advanced 8% on its Nasdaq debut; Coinbase rebounded after sell-off over data leak and SEC probe.
  • Inflation expectations hit multi-decade highs, which may temper hopes of Fed rate cuts.

data.title: World Liberty's Stablecoin Now Available on Multiple Networks Via Chainlink's Interoperability Protocol
data.description:
• World Liberty Financial’s USD1 stablecoin is now operable across multiple blockchains through Chainlink’s CCIP.
  • USD1, a U.S. dollar-backed stablecoin, has seen its adoption grow and reached $2 billion in market capitalization.
  • The CCIP integration addresses cross-chain security vulnerabilities, which have historically cost users billions, the firms said.

data.title: TRX Struggles at $0.278 Resistance as Trade Tensions Weigh on Markets
data.description:
• US-China trade tensions escalate as new tariff threats send ripples through cryptocurrency markets, with TRX experiencing increased volatility.
  • Tron's USDT circulation reaches record $73.8 billion on-chain, cementing its position as the dominant blockchain for stablecoin transactions.
  • Major institutional players quietly accumulate TRX positions amid regulatory clarity improvements, with World Liberty Financial's integration boosting investor confidence.

data.title: DeFi Development Surges 30%  on BONK Validator Partnership, More SOL Purchases
data.description:
• Solana-focused DeFi Development hit fresh record prices after partnering with Solana-based memecoin community BONK to co-manage a validator, and purchasing more SOL tokens.
  • The company, formerly known as Janover, aligns with a growing trend of public firms adding cryptocurrencies to their balance sheets.
  • DFDV shares advanced as much as 30% on Friday and were up 2,800% since the pivot to Solana.

data.title: Bitcoin Adoption News: Top Win Rebrands, Steak N Shake Accepts BTC, Galaxy's Nasdaq Debut
data.description:
• Galaxy Digital shares debuted on the Nasdaq with founder Mike Novogratz ringing the opening bell on the trading floor.
  • Fast food chain Steak n' Shake has begun accepting payments in bitcoin.
  • Luxury goods wholesaler Top Win is rebranding to AsiaStrategy as part of a pivot to digital assets.
